sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: TBT ETF Analysis: Dividends, Returns AMEX:TBT
feed.summary: This article provides an in-depth analysis of the ProShares UltraShort Lehman 20 Year Treasury (TBT) ETF, focusing on its dividends and returns. It highlights TBT as a leveraged product offering -2x exposure to daily moves in long-term T-bonds, suitable for tactical positioning against rising interest rates rather than a long-term investment. The analysis covers key statistics like AUM, dividend yield, expense ratio, and fund flows, along with answers to frequently asked questions about its performance and structure.

feed.title: Sanara MedTech Inc. Reports Fourth Quarter (Unaudited) and Full Year 2025 Financial Results; Reaffirmed Full Year 2026 Financial Guidance
feed.summary: Sanara MedTech Inc. announced strong financial results for the full year 2025, with net revenue exceeding $100 million for the first time, marking a 19% increase year-over-year. The company also reported a 5% increase in fourth-quarter net revenue and reaffirmed its financial guidance for full-year 2026, anticipating 13% to 17% growth. Key operational achievements include an Innovative Technology contract for its BIASURGE product and the publication of a peer-reviewed study on its CellerateRX Surgical Powder.

feed.title: Suburban Propane Expands NASCAR Presence, Now Powering 21 Racetracks Nationwide
feed.summary: Suburban Propane (NYSE: SPH) has expanded its partnership with NASCAR, now powering 21 racetracks nationwide, including new events at the U.S. Naval Base Coronado San Diego and a return to Chicagoland Speedway. The company provides essential propane for race-weekend operations, such as track dryers, concessions, and campgrounds. This expansion highlights Suburban Propane's commitment to supporting large-scale live events and delivering dependable energy solutions.

feed.title: Suburban Propane Expands NASCAR Presence, Now Powering 21 Racetracks Nationwide
feed.summary: Suburban Propane has expanded its partnership with NASCAR, now fueling 21 racetracks nationwide. This expansion includes new events at the U.S. Naval Base in Coronado, California, and a return to Chicagoland Speedway, reinforcing Suburban Propane's role in powering race day operations, fan experiences, and campgrounds. The company's reliable energy solutions, including propane, are critical for maintaining race schedules and supporting large-scale events.

feed.title: New Broadcom and Carahsoft Agreement With DISA Delivers Uniform Pricing and Cost Transparency for DoW Agencies
feed.summary: Broadcom Inc. and Carahsoft Technology Corp. have secured a five-year, $970 million blanket purchase agreement (BPA) with the Defense Information Systems Agency (DISA). This agreement aims to streamline and consolidate software contracts, providing uniform pricing and cost transparency for private cloud infrastructure and security solutions to various Department of War (DoW) agencies. The deal leverages the VMware by Broadcom Cloud Foundation (VCF) platform to enhance mission capabilities, reduce costs, and accelerate secure digital transformation, ultimately supporting next-generation AI-enabled defense capabilities.

feed.title: F5 and Forcepoint form alliance to secure enterprise AI operations
feed.summary: F5 and Forcepoint have announced a strategic partnership aimed at enhancing the security of enterprise AI operations. This collaboration integrates Forcepoint's Data Security Posture Management for data classification with F5's AI security tools within its Application Delivery and Security Platform. The joint solution intends to address common security challenges in AI deployments by providing continuous protection throughout the data lifecycle, from discovery to runtime.

feed.title: Zenity Announces Partnership With ServiceNow to Operationalize AI Agent Risk Reduction in SecOps
feed.summary: Zenity has announced a partnership with ServiceNow to integrate its AI agent security and governance platform natively into ServiceNow Security Operations (SecOps). This collaboration aims to provide enterprises with comprehensive visibility, risk management, and vulnerability assessment for autonomous AI agents, enabling them to scale AI adoption safely across various departments. The partnership will enhance ServiceNow's AI Control Tower and SecOps with agent inventory, AI security posture management, vulnerability assessment, and efficient remediation workflows.

feed.title: Dollar General names Jerry Fleeman Jr. as CEO to succeed Todd Vasos in 2027
feed.summary: Dollar General has announced that Jerry W. "JJ" Fleeman Jr. will take over as CEO on January 1, 2027, succeeding Todd Vasos. Vasos will serve as a senior advisor until April 2, 2027, and is expected to remain on the board. Fleeman currently leads Ahold Delhaize USA, Inc., bringing over 35 years of grocery retail experience.

feed.title: BMO Capital Markets Lowers Blackstone (NYSE:BX) Price Target to $126.00
feed.summary: BMO Capital Markets has reduced its price target for Blackstone (NYSE:BX) from $165 to $126, while maintaining an "outperform" rating, suggesting a potential 15.26% upside. Despite a strong earnings report where Blackstone exceeded revenue and EPS expectations, the stock's consensus rating remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average target of $164, although some analysts have recently lowered their targets. Insider transactions also show mixed signals with a significant share sale and purchase recently disclosed.

feed.title: Stephens Reiterates Equal Weight Rating for Builders FirstSource (NYSE:BLDR)
feed.summary: Stephens reiterated an "Equal Weight" rating for Builders FirstSource (NYSE:BLDR) with a price target of $125.00, suggesting a potential upside of approximately 47.6%. This comes after the company missed its recent quarterly earnings and revenue estimates. Despite a "Hold" consensus rating from other analysts, director Paul S. Levy recently made a significant insider purchase of 50,000 shares, signaling confidence in the stock.

feed.title: Huntington Bank Introduces Team Huntington Golf Ambassadors
feed.summary: Huntington National Bank has announced its 2026 Team Huntington golf ambassador roster, featuring 24 professional golfers, including LPGA Hall of Famer Nancy Lopez and World No. 1 Scottie Scheffler. This initiative underscores Huntington's commitment to investing in talent across various professional tours and strengthening its community ties, particularly in regions where it has expanded its presence. The program aims to support athletes throughout their careers and engage with communities through on-course branding and engagement initiatives.

feed.title: VOESH BRINGS SCIENCE-BACKED K-BEAUTY BODY CARE TO ULTA BEAUTY
feed.summary: VOESH, a science-backed K-beauty body care brand, has officially launched its collection at Ulta Beauty, both online and in over 450 stores nationwide. Founded in 2013, VOESH offers high-performance, vegan body treatments made in Korea, applying facial skincare principles to body care. The brand aims to transform daily routines into moments of intentional wellness with its spa-inspired lineup, available at Ulta with prices ranging from $9 to $49.

feed.title: ConocoPhillips Rose 5% This Week. Here’s Why Oil Prices Could Drive Further Upside in 2026
feed.summary: ConocoPhillips (COP) stock increased by 5% this week, driven by rising crude prices that boosted expected earnings and free cash flow for upstream producers. The company benefits from its pure upstream focus and low-cost asset base, allowing strong free cash flow generation. While some insider selling occurred, institutional ownership remains high, and a valuation model suggests the stock is currently modestly undervalued with potential for further upside.

feed.title: PYPL Shareholder Alert: PayPal Holdings, Inc. Securities Class Action Lawsuit Investors With Losses May Join -- The Gross Law Firm
feed.summary: The Gross Law Firm has issued a shareholder alert for investors of PayPal Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: PYPL) who incurred losses during the class period of February 25, 2025, to February 2, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that PayPal made false and misleading statements regarding its financial targets and its salesforce's ability to achieve growth. Following disappointing earnings on February 3, 2026, PayPal's stock price dropped significantly, leading to this class action with a lead plaintiff deadline of April 20, 2026.

feed.title: SNOW Shareholder Alert: Snowflake Inc. Securities Class Action Lawsuit Investors With Losses May Join -- The Gross Law Firm
feed.summary: The Gross Law Firm has issued a shareholder alert for Snowflake Inc. (NYSE: SNOW), announcing a securities class action lawsuit. Investors who purchased SNOW shares between June 27, 2023, and February 28, 2024, are encouraged to join, as the complaint alleges the company made materially false and misleading statements regarding consumption patterns, revenues, and demand for its products. The deadline for shareholders to seek lead plaintiff appointment is April 27, 2026.

feed.title: APO Shareholder Alert: May 1, 2026 Lead Plaintiff Deadline in Apollo Global management, Inc. Securities Class Action Lawsuit -- The Gross Law Firm
feed.summary: The Gross Law Firm has issued a shareholder alert for Apollo Global Management, Inc. (NYSE: APO) investors who purchased shares between May 10, 2021, and February 21, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Apollo Global's leadership frequently communicated with Jeffrey Epstein and that the company's statements denying business with him were false and misleading, causing reputational harm. Shareholders have until May 1, 2026, to seek lead plaintiff appointment in this securities class action.

feed.title: Ameriprise Financial Announces Schedule for First Quarter 2026 Investor Conference Call
feed.summary: Ameriprise Financial, Inc. (NYSE: AMP) will release its first quarter 2026 financial results on Thursday, April 23, 2026, at approximately 4:15 p.m. ET. The company will follow with an investor conference call at 5:00 p.m. ET on the same day to review these results. Live audio, presentation slides, and an audio replay will be available on their investor relations website.

feed.title: Adobe veteran joins NeutronX to build AI systems for federal infrastructure
feed.summary: NeutronX, a federal-focused technology integrator, has appointed Alex Gaber, a former Senior Enterprise Architect at Adobe, as its senior enterprise architect. Gaber brings over two decades of experience in enterprise architecture and AI, with a focus on high-throughput data-flow and large-scale platform integration. His expertise will be applied to developing AI-enabled energy and infrastructure solutions for federal missions, impacting NeutronX's stock positively.

feed.title: Intuit’s $3.5 Billion Buyback Acceleration Signals Deep Value After a 27% Year-to-Date Decline
feed.summary: Intuit's leadership has accelerated $3.5 billion in stock buybacks amidst a 34% year-to-date decline in share price, signaling insider confidence despite AI disruption fears. The company reported strong Q2 FY2026 results, beating revenue and EPS estimates, with significant growth in TurboTax and mid-market segments. Analysts project substantial upside for INTU stock, supported by robust free cash flow and a large addressable market.

feed.title: HCA Healthcare Oppenheimer Conference: The 30% Market Share Mandate and an $880 Price Target
feed.summary: HCA Healthcare (HCA) is implementing an aggressive network optimization strategy, aiming for a 30% market share across its domestic markets by the end of the decade, despite navigating significant macro challenges like changes in health insurance marketplaces and regulatory risks. The company plans to expand its outpatient sites and is leveraging AI to offset revenue drags and manage operational efficiencies. TIKR's Advanced Model projects an $882 price target, driven by HCA's consistent volume, durable margins due to AI, and strategic capital allocation including substantial share repurchases.

feed.title: 24/7 prediction markets need faster clearing; FIS launches system
feed.summary: FIS (NYSE: FIS) has launched its new CD Prediction Clearing solution, providing 24/7 post-trade clearing for regulated prediction markets. This initiative comes as prediction markets are projected to grow five-fold by 2030, necessitating faster, real-time clearing infrastructure to replace legacy batch processes. The solution aims to support high-volume transaction processing and 24/7 availability, enabling financial institutions to confidently enter and operate within these fast-moving markets.

feed.title: F5 and Forcepoint join forces for AI security
feed.summary: F5 and Forcepoint have partnered to enhance AI security through a joint initiative focusing on data discovery, classification, runtime protection, and continuous monitoring. Forcepoint provides the Data Security Posture Management (DSPM) for sensitive data across various environments, while F5's Application Delivery and Security Platform (ADSP) enforces policies on APIs, applications, and AI agents. This collaboration aims to help enterprises manage AI risks in real-time and adapt to the evolving data security landscape.

feed.title: Sensitive data meets AI guardrails in F5-Forcepoint alliance
feed.summary: F5 and Forcepoint have announced a new alliance to enhance AI security for enterprises, covering the entire lifecycle from data discovery and classification to runtime protection. This partnership aims to address the challenges organizations face in securing sensitive data within rapidly deploying AI systems. By combining Forcepoint's data intelligence with F5's application security and AI guardrails, the collaboration provides continuous, adaptive protection against evolving AI-related risks.

feed.title: F5 and Forcepoint partner to secure AI across data and runtime lifecycle
feed.summary: F5 Inc. and Forcepoint LLC have announced a partnership to enhance AI security throughout its lifecycle, from data discovery and classification to runtime protection. This collaboration combines Forcepoint's AI-native Data Security Posture Management with F5's AI Red Team and AI Guardrails to address security gaps as organizations rapidly deploy AI applications. The joint solution aims to provide real-time identification of data vulnerabilities, enforce runtime controls, and monitor AI systems for misuse, ensuring secure and compliant AI operations.

feed.title: ENPH Shareholder Alert: Investors With Losses May Seek to Lead the Class Action in Enphase Energy, Inc. Securities Lawsuit -- The Gross Law Firm
feed.summary: The Gross Law Firm has issued a shareholder alert for investors of Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: ENPH), announcing a securities class action lawsuit against the company. The lawsuit alleges that Enphase made materially false and misleading statements regarding its ability to manage channel inventory and mitigate effects from the termination of the 25D Credit, thereby overstating its financial and operational prospects. Shareholders who purchased ENPH shares between April 22, 2025, and October 28, 2025, are encouraged to contact the firm to potentially be appointed lead plaintiff, with a deadline of April 20, 2026.

feed.title: Dollar General Corporation Appoints Jerry W. “JJ” Fleeman Jr., as Chief Executive Officer
feed.summary: Dollar General Corporation announced the appointment of Jerry W. “JJ” Fleeman Jr., to succeed Todd Vasos as Chief Executive Officer, effective January 1, 2027. Vasos will continue as CEO until then, transitioning to Senior Advisor and remaining on the Board. Fleeman brings over 35 years of experience in grocery retail, previously serving as CEO of Ahold Delhaize USA, and is expected to build on Dollar General's strong growth trajectory.

feed.title: SMR Shareholder Alert: April 20, 2026 Lead Plaintiff Deadline in NuScale Power Corporation Securities Class Action Lawsuit -- The Gross Law Firm
feed.summary: The Gross Law Firm has issued a shareholder alert for NuScale Power Corporation (NYSE: SMR), notifying investors of a securities class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that NuScale made materially false or misleading statements regarding its commercialization strategy and its partner, ENTRA1 Energy LLC, during the period of May 13, 2025, to November 6, 2025. Shareholders who purchased SMR shares during this period are encouraged to contact the firm, with the lead plaintiff deadline set for April 20, 2026.

feed.title: Portnoy Law Firm Announces Class Action on Behalf of Oracle Corporation Investors
feed.summary: The Portnoy Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit on behalf of Oracle Corporation (NYSE: ORCL) investors who purchased securities between June 12, 2025, and December 16, 2025. The lawsuit stems from significant drops in Oracle's stock price following revelations related to a $300 billion cloud computing contract with OpenAI, plans to raise $38 billion in debt for AI infrastructure, and a revised forecast for a $15 billion increase in fiscal 2026 CapEx. Investors have until April 6, 2026, to file a lead plaintiff motion.

feed.title: Ford recalls more than 254,000 vehicles due to software issue that can disrupt rearview camera
feed.summary: Ford Motor Co. is recalling 254,640 Lincoln and Explorer vehicles due to a software issue that can disrupt the rearview camera and other advanced driver assistance features. The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) stated the image processing software could unexpectedly reset, leading to a loss of critical safety functions and increasing crash risk. Ford will offer free software updates at dealerships and over-the-air, with notification letters to affected owners being mailed on March 30.

feed.title: Executive bonus plans for 2026 outlined by TDS (NYSE: TDS)
feed.summary: Telephone and Data Systems, Inc. (TDS) has adopted a 2026 executive bonus program, detailed in an 8-K filing, which largely ties executive payouts to company performance. The plan covers various executive roles, including the TDS Vice Chair and the President and CEO of TDS Telecom, with payouts contingent on company and individual performance, as well as approval by the Compensation and Human Resources Committee. It also incorporates the Array 2026 Annual Incentive Plan for Array Digital Infrastructure's President and CEO, who is a named executive officer of TDS.

feed.title: Argus reiterates Eversource Energy stock rating on dividend hike
feed.summary: Argus has maintained a Buy rating and a $73.00 price target for Eversource Energy (NYSE:ES) due to its 4.7% dividend increase and attractive yield. The company reported strong Q4 2025 revenue and earnings growth and has seen regulatory approvals for asset sales and offshore wind projects, reducing future earnings risk. Despite some indications of overvaluation by InvestingPro, Argus finds the stock favorably valued compared to peers based on several metrics.

feed.title: Akamai Technologies Inc. stock hits new 52-week high on NASDAQ amid cybersecurity surge
feed.summary: Akamai Technologies Inc. (AKAM) shares reached a new 52-week high of $114.95 on NASDAQ, driven by strong investor confidence in its cybersecurity and content delivery solutions. The surge is attributed to growing demand for edge computing amid escalating cyber threats and AI adoption, positioning Akamai as a leader benefiting from rising cybersecurity budgets and partnerships with hyperscalers. Analysts rate AKAM as Outperform, with a consensus price target suggesting modest upside, while its shift towards security and AI integration promises multi-year growth.

feed.title: FedEx (FDX) Launches Innovative SameDay Local Delivery Service
feed.summary: FedEx (FDX) has introduced FedEx SameDay Local, a new delivery service offering two-hour or end-of-day options through a national network of over 1,000 providers in partnership with OneRail. This service aims to meet customer demands for flexibility and efficiency while managing costs. The article also provides a financial analysis of FedEx, highlighting its robust revenue generation, strong profitability, and moderate market valuation concerns.

feed.title: Cevian-controlled funds now hold 10.1% of Smith & Nephew (NYSE: SNN) voting rights
feed.summary: Funds controlled by Cevian Capital II G.P. Limited have significantly increased their stake in Smith & Nephew (NYSE: SNN), now holding 10.094356% of its voting rights, up from 5.021046%. This move, disclosed in a Form 6-K filing, establishes Cevian as a major shareholder with 85,790,848 voting rights, potentially increasing their influence in governance matters. The shares are legally held by Aurora Nominees Limited on behalf of UBS AG as custodian.

feed.title: NetApp unveils new high-performance EF Series models
feed.summary: NetApp has launched new EF-Series storage systems, the EF50 and EF80, designed to handle demanding workloads like AI, HPC, and databases. These systems offer significantly improved read and write throughput, better power efficiency, and high storage density. NetApp aims to provide scalable, efficient, and affordable solutions for businesses facing increasing data volumes and the rise of AI-powered applications.

feed.title: Sanara MedTech Inc. (SMTI) Misses Q4 EPS Estimates by 215.9%
feed.summary: Sanara MedTech Inc. (SMTI) reported a significant miss on its Q4 EPS estimates, with a GAAP loss of -$0.13 per share against an expected profit of $0.11, missing by 215.9%. The company posted a net loss of $1.1M on revenues of $27.5M, which still represented 5.0% year-over-year growth. For the full year, Sanara MedTech projects revenue guidance between $116.0M and $121.0M.

feed.title: Protagonist Partners With JNJ To Compete With AbbVie's Skyrizi (PTGX)
feed.summary: Protagonist Therapeutics receives a Buy rating due to the FDA approval of Icotyde, an oral IL-23 receptor antagonist for plaque psoriasis, and strong commercialization prospects. Icotyde offers best-in-class oral efficacy and safety, with significant revenue potential from royalties and milestones with Johnson & Johnson. The company's pipeline, including Rusfertide, and its Vectrix platform, target multiple therapeutic areas, positioning Protagonist for future profitability and potential acquisition interest.

feed.title: Hormel Foods Corporation (NYSE:HRL) Plans Quarterly Dividend of $0.29
feed.summary: Hormel Foods Corporation (HRL) declared a quarterly dividend of $0.2925 per share, payable on May 15th to shareholders of record by April 13th, representing an annual dividend of $1.17 and a yield of 5.2%. The company has a 60-year track record of dividend increases and a manageable payout ratio of 65%. Hormel Foods recently exceeded Q4 EPS estimates but missed slightly on revenue, and its stock is currently trading near $22.43 with a P/E ratio of 25.20.

feed.title: Digital Realty Further Expands Mediterranean Presence with Strategic Land Acquisitions in Milan
feed.summary: Digital Realty has announced its entry into the Milan market with the acquisition of two land parcels for a new data center campus in Abbiategrasso. This expansion strengthens Digital Realty's leadership in the Mediterranean and Southern Europe, complementing its existing presence in Rome. The Milan campus will initially feature an 8-megawatt facility, with plans for further expansion up to 84 MW, aiming to cater to the growing demand for cloud, AI, and interconnection services in Northern Italy.

feed.title: GLP-1 And Private Labels Are A Genuine Threat To General Mills But I May Buy This Dip (NYSE:GIS)
feed.summary: General Mills (GIS) is rated a soft buy despite underperforming expectations, as its valuation appears attractive after a prolonged decline. The company faces headwinds from GLP-1 appetite-suppressing drugs and rising private label popularity, impacting revenue and brand strength. While GIS shows strong net income margins and a high forward dividend yield of 6.59%, its declining revenues and substantial current liabilities raise questions about dividend sustainability.

feed.title: Ecolab upgraded at J.P. Morgan on pricing power, shift to higher-growth businesses (ECL:NYSE)
feed.summary: J.P. Morgan upgraded Ecolab (ECL) to Overweight from Neutral, maintaining a $295 price target. The upgrade is attributed to Ecolab's strong balance sheet and ability to manage a difficult operating environment, with recent stock weakness believed to already price in potential earnings pressure. The firm anticipates margin protection from pricing actions and long-term growth through acquisitions in key areas like water treatment and data center cooling.

feed.title: After Rome, Digital Realty moves into Milan to span Italy’s key hubs
feed.summary: Digital Realty has announced its entry into the Milan market with the acquisition of two land parcels to build a new data center campus. This expansion, featuring an initial 8 MW facility scalable to 84 MW, complements its existing Rome development, positioning Digital Realty as the sole global platform with campuses in both of Italy's key connectivity hubs. The move aims to support the region's growing digital transformation, cloud, and AI demands, strengthening digital infrastructure across Southern Europe.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley defends Monster Beverage amid concerns over high US gas prices
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has defended Monster Beverage (NASDAQ: MNST) against concerns that high US gas prices could negatively impact the company's sales. The firm argues that while gas stations are a significant channel for Monster sales, consumer behavior research indicates that gas prices do not materially affect the frequency or size of Monster purchases. This suggests the stock's current discount, possibly due to these concerns, presents a buying opportunity.

feed.title: Tradr Launches Leveraged ETFs on AMZN, AAOI, HL and IBM
feed.summary: Tradr ETFs has launched four new leveraged ETFs on single stocks: Amazon.com Inc. (AMZN), Applied Optoelectronics Inc. (AAOI), Hecla Mining Co. (HL), and International Business Machines Corp. (IBM). These first-to-market funds aim to deliver either two times the inverse (-200%) or two times long (200%) the daily performance of the underlying stock. Tradr ETFs, which manages $3 billion in assets, provides these tools for sophisticated investors and professional traders to express high-conviction market views.

feed.title: PPG Launches Analytics Platform to Improve Marine Coatings Purch
feed.summary: PPG Industries Inc. has released PPG InsightsNav, an advanced analytics platform designed to help marine operators optimize their purchasing data for seastock coatings. This tool aims to address challenges with fragmented historical data by providing standardized access, enabling more strategic decisions and cost savings. Despite some insider selling, PPG shows strong financial health with attractive valuation metrics and robust institutional ownership.

feed.title: Invesco (IVZ) Collaborates with Superstate for Short Duration US Securities Fund
feed.summary: Invesco (IVZ) has partnered with financial technology company Superstate to become the investment manager for the Superstate Short Duration US Government Securities Fund (STB). This collaboration allows Invesco to utilize Superstate's tokenization technology and digital transfer agent infrastructure. Invesco's Global Liquidity team will manage the USTB fund, which will be rebranded as the Invesco Short Duration US Government Securities Fund while retaining its existing ticker.

feed.title: Sonoma Pharmaceuticals Announces U.S. Retail Launch of Advanced Burn Relief Hydrogel in CVS and Walmart
feed.summary: Sonoma Pharmaceuticals, Inc. has launched its advanced hypochlorous acid (HOCl) based burn relief hydrogel in CVS and Walmart stores nationwide. This product is designed for minor burns and skin irritations, expanding on the company's existing professional healthcare applications for HOCl technology. The launch leverages strategic partnerships to deliver clinically-backed, gentle skincare solutions to the consumer over-the-counter market.

feed.title: [Form 4] Sprouts Farmers Market, Inc. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Sprouts Farmers Market, Inc.'s Chief Legal Officer, Brandon F. Lombardi, reported an open-market sale of 297 shares of common stock at $83.9715 per share. This transaction was a non-discretionary broker-assisted sale to cover withholding taxes from vesting restricted stock units. Following this, Lombardi holds 7,207 share-based interests, including common stock and restricted stock units set to vest between March 2027 and March 2029.

feed.title: Sprouts Farmers Market (NASDAQ: SFM) CDO sells shares for taxes
feed.summary: David McGlinchey, Chief Development Officer of Sprouts Farmers Market (SFM), sold 297 shares of common stock at $83.9715 per share. This was a mandatory, broker-assisted sale to cover withholding taxes triggered by the vesting of restricted stock units, not a discretionary trade. After the transaction, McGlinchey retains 47,897 equity-linked interests, including common stock and restricted stock units.

feed.title: Surrozen's (SRZN) Buy Rating Reaffirmed at HC Wainwright
feed.summary: HC Wainwright has reaffirmed its "buy" rating for Surrozen (SRZN) and increased its price target to $36, signaling a potential upside of 42.6%. This comes despite Surrozen reporting a significant quarterly EPS miss and very negative margins. Notably, company insiders have recently increased their holdings, with major shareholders acquiring over 208,000 shares totaling approximately $4.47 million in the last three months, indicating strong insider confidence.
